layouts\\Layout.astro.title: {title}

hero.title: Institutional Excellence in Tech Careers
hero.description: We provide the architectural foundation for career transformation, merging elite academic standards with rapid industrial deployment.

story.title: The Sky States Story
story.paragraph: Founded at the intersection of professional development and industrial demand, Sky States was created to bridge a critical fracture: the widening gap between high-potential talent and the specific, high-velocity requirements of elite technology firms.
story.vision_desc: To serve as the global standard for career acceleration, ensuring every professional has access to the structural guidance needed to reach their peak potential.
story.method_desc: We utilize a "High-Touch, High-Trust" model, where institutional accountability meets personalized mentorship.

registry.legal_desc: Sky States is a legally registered corporation in the United States, operating under strict compliance with state and federal regulations.

hero.title: Advisory Support & Transparency
hero.description: Ensuring every candidate has the data they need for a confident transition into their global professional journey.

questions.q: Is Sky States a legitimate US-registered company?
questions.a: Yes. Sky States operates as a legally compliant career acceleration entity within the U.S. We maintain active registry status in Delaware (File Number #8291-XX) and Wyoming (Corporate ID #X229-L). You can verify our active registry details directly on the official Delaware Division of Corporations Registry and the Wyoming Secretary of State Database.

No. We prioritize candidate identity protection and cybersecurity. **Sky States does not collect Social Security Numbers (SSNs) or personal identifiers at any stage of the application or onboarding.** All payments are routed securely via PCI-compliant, encrypted gateways.

Our curriculum is structured to yield clear ROI. Program participants see an average salary increase of 42% within 6 months of placement. The fee includes personalized CTO advisory, interview prep, and full access to Microsoft Professional Certification tracks valued at over $1,200.

questions.q: What is the refund initiation process?
questions.a: We operate under a clear, transparent refund policy: a 3-Day 'No Questions' full refund window within 72 hours of payment, and a 14-Day pro-rated window (minus administrative license fees). To initiate a refund request, simply email support@skystates.com.

hero.headline:
Sky States is a US-registered Career Acceleration Platform
for senior professionals.
hero.description: We provide live, instructor-led training and active placement support for career transitions into Data Science, Cyber Security, and DevOps.

about.title: Accelerate Your Transition with Expert Mentorship
about.description: At Sky States, we don't just teach courses; we build careers. Our platform is specifically designed for professionals looking to make a significant shift into high-demand tech roles through practical, project-based learning and direct access to industry experts.

data-science-ai.metaTitle: SKY STATES | Data Science & AI Architect Program

hero.headline:
Data Science & AI
Architect.
hero.description: An intensive, technical mastery program designed for professionals seeking to lead the next generation of intelligent systems. From foundational neural networks to large-scale LLM orchestration.

curriculum.title: Architectural Curriculum
curriculum.description: A structured, high-fidelity journey through the core pillars of modern systems.

modules.title: Neural Networks & Deep Learning
modules.description: Master the mathematical foundations of perceptrons, backpropagation, and transformer architectures. Move beyond theory into high-performance implementation.

modules.title: Generative AI & LLM Orchestration
modules.description: The new frontier of orchestration. Building agentic workflows and fine-tuning enterprise-grade models.

modules.title: Big Data Ops
modules.description: Scaling intelligence requires robust pipelines. Distributed computing and petabyte-scale data strategy.

final_module.title: Full-Stack AI Deployment
final_module.description: From notebook to production-grade API with Kubernetes and CI/CD for ML (MLOps).

career.description: Starting path for career pivoters with strong engineering backgrounds.
Translating business complexity into scalable neural architectures.
Leading global research and development of proprietary LLMs.

hero.headline:
Cyber Security
Strategist
hero.description: Move beyond defensive engineering into the realm of institutional risk architecture. A rigorous program designed for leaders who secure the backbone of modern enterprise.

curriculum.title: A Three-Pillar Framework for Executive Excellence.
curriculum.description: A structured, high-fidelity journey through the core pillars of modern systems.

modules.title: Advanced Penetration Testing
modules.description: Systematic identification and exploitation of vulnerabilities within enterprise infrastructures using elite red-team protocols.

modules.title: Zero-Trust Architecture
modules.description: Implementing 'never trust, always verify' paradigms across distributed network ecosystems and identity management.

modules.title: Institutional Risk Management
modules.description: Aligning security technicalities with board-level business objectives and regulatory compliance landscapes.

final_module.title: Sky States Security Architect Designation
final_module.description: Graduates earn the industry-recognized SSAD credential, certifying their ability to lead complex cybersecurity transformations at the highest levels of enterprise and government.

career.description: Managing elite red and blue teams to proactively identify threats and respond to critical incidents.
Designing high-resilience network fabrics and cloud-native security postures for hyper-scale environments.
Governing global risk portfolios and leading cross-functional defense strategies for large-cap enterprises.

hero.headline:
Cloud Infrastructure
Master
hero.description: Architecting the future of institutional scale. Master the complex layers of modern orchestration, distributed systems, and global cloud governance through a rigorous clinical curriculum.

curriculum.title: Architectural Pillars
curriculum.description: A structured, high-fidelity journey through the core pillars of modern systems.

modules.title: Kubernetes Mastery
modules.description: Dive deep into container orchestration at scale. Master control planes, custom resource definitions, and service mesh architectures for multi-cloud deployments.

modules.title: Infrastructure as Code
modules.description: Develop immutable infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible. Learn to treat your entire global topology as a versioned, testable software product.

modules.title: High-Availability
modules.description: Engineer systems with five-nines reliability. Study disaster recovery patterns, regional failovers, and low-latency edge distribution networks.

final_module.title: Sky States Cloud Architect Credential
final_module.description: This is more than a certificate. It is a verified testament to your mastery of enterprise-scale engineering. Recognized by leading technology firms as the benchmark for high-authority infrastructure roles.

career.description: Global Systems Strategy & Performance management in modern cloud enterprises.
Executive Technical Leadership driving regional and global infrastructure architecture.

jobs_content.title: AI Automation & Data Scientist
jobs_content.description: A Data Ethicist focuses on ensuring that data-driven systems, especially those involving machine learning and AI, are designed, implemented, and maintained in ways that are ethical, fair, and transparent across global architectures.

jobs_content.title: AI Infrastructure Engineer
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a highly skilled AI Infrastructure Engineer to design, implement, and maintain scalable infrastructure that supports artificial intelligence and machine learning workloads. Candidates should be proficient in GPU clustering, cloud compute optimization, Kubernetes, and model caching paradigms.

jobs_content.title: Bio-Cybersecurity Specialist
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a highly motivated Bio-Cybersecurity Specialist to protect and secure biological, healthcare, and research systems from emerging cyber threats. The ideal candidate will bridge the gap between biological safety protocols and network security architectures, ensuring end-to-end data integrity.

jobs_content.title: Chatbot Engineer (Gen AI / RASA Developer)
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a highly skilled Chatbot Engineer with expertise in Generative AI and RASA to design, develop, and deploy intelligent conversational AI solutions. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience integrating LLMs, configuring intent classification models, and fine-tuning conversational dialogues.

jobs_content.title: Conversational AI Designer
jobs_content.description: We are seeking an innovative Conversational AI Designer to create engaging, intuitive, and human-centered conversational experiences for AI-powered products and services. The ideal candidate will have experience designing voice and text user interfaces, flowcharts, and chatbot personas.

jobs_content.title: Data Engineer (AI-Focused)
jobs_content.description: We are looking for a skilled Data Engineer with hands-on experience in AI projects. The ideal candidate will design, build, and optimize data pipelines and architectures to support AI and Machine Learning models in real-time production.

jobs_content.title: Data Science Analyst
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a motivated Data Science Analyst to join our team. The ideal candidate will transform raw data into actionable insights, support executive decision-making, and contribute to data-driven strategies across global technology partners.

jobs_content.title: Data Scientist
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a talented and analytical Data Scientist to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for analyzing large datasets, developing predictive models, and translating complex analytics into clear, actionable business strategies.

jobs_content.title: Enterprise AI Leader / Director of AI
jobs_content.description: We are looking for a visionary Enterprise AI Leader / Director of AI to drive organization-wide AI strategy and transformation. This role is responsible for leading AI initiatives, aligning research prototypes with production scaling, establishing ethical AI frameworks, and managing multi-disciplinary engineering cohorts.

jobs_content.title: Financial Data Analysis
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a highly analytical Financial Data Analyst to support financial planning, reporting, and business decision-making through data-driven insights. The ideal candidate will possess strong financial modeling skills, experience with SQL and data visualization tools, and a track record of identifying optimization opportunities.

jobs_content.title: Gen AI Security Engineer
jobs_content.description: The Safe-and-Sound team makes Spotify safe and enjoyable for every listener. From podcast recommendations to AI Playlists, we are looking for a Gen AI Security Engineer to evaluate LLM vulnerability risks, implement red-teaming, and prevent model jailbreaks.

jobs_content.title: Insurance AI Specialist
jobs_content.description: We are seeking an Insurance AI Specialist to develop and implement Artificial Intelligence solutions for the insurance industry. The candidate will help improve risk assessment models, automate claim processing pipelines, and build robust deep learning models to screen for fraud detection.

jobs_content.title: Power BI Consultant
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Power BI Consultant to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining interactive dashboards, building complex DAX calculations, and optimizing data refresh pipelines to support enterprise business intelligence.

jobs_content.title: PowerBI Data Analyst
jobs_content.description: Join the Apple team as a PowerBI Data Analyst. Please make sure that candidates have been using PowerBI, SQL, and Python on a weekly basis for the past 5+ years. Excellent communication and dashboard design skills are required.

jobs_content.title: Security Data Analyst
jobs_content.description: We are seeking a Security Data Analyst to inspire the future of business with AI + Data + CRM + Trust. You will analyze threat metrics, monitor cybersecurity dashboards, and build automated compliance alerts to safeguard enterprise infrastructure.
